The '''Kalzerians''' were [[near-Human]]s from the planet [[Kalzeron]] with gray, leather-like skin. They also had black teeth, and yellow eyes. Developing from a feudal, tribal people with a defining sense of battlefield honor, the Kalzerians had not yet reached the atomic era by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

When Kalzeron was subjugated by the [[Galactic Empire]], some Kalzerians such as the [[mercenary]] [[Azuroth Khell]] joined off-planet resistance movements, intending to gather equipment and training enough to return and liberate their planet in a glorious revolution. Before this came to pass however, Kalzeron was freed from the Empire's yoke following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], when Imperial forces were withdrawn. Those Kalzerians who had left the planet were branded as cowards by their fellows on their homeworld's resistance and a formal charter from their over-council decreed them as traitors.<ref name="Bright" />
